top_signals.title: 10 Dead in Russian Missile Strike on Corn Ship in Black Sea
top_signals.summary: A Russian missile strike on a ship carrying corn near Ukraine's southern port of Odesa killed 10 people, Ukrainian officials said on Monday, in the deadliest attack in a weeks-long flare-up of violence in the Black Sea.Russia hit the Golden…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russian Wheat Export Prices Soar Amidst Escalating Hostilities
top_signals.summary: Russian wheat export prices surged last week amid difficult shipping conditions in the Black Sea and a new wave of attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, analysts said on Monday.Forecasts for July wheat shipments from Russia continued to fall, even…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Czech central bank chief warns against joining Eurozone too early
top_signals.summary: Aleš Michl also resists calls to lower interest rates as he criticises country’s feuding president and prime minister
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tether’s Three-Way Crypto Deal Is Called Off, Mallers Steps Down
top_signals.summary: A proposed merger of three crypto firms has been scrapped, with one of their leaders stepping down and another consolidating power across the Tether-backed franchise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Adnoc to invest in $6.2bn natural gas schemes as UAE bids for self-sufficiency
top_signals.summary: Abu Dhabi oil group races to keep pace with domestic demand while facing potential end of gas supply deal with Qatar
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Novo Nordisk accuses Eli Lilly of deceptive marketing in weight-loss fight
top_signals.summary: Danish group claims rival used outdated data to support claims that its products were more effective than Wegovy
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
